title: FCC Ramps Up Its Drone Ban, Targets 9 Companies Making DJI Clones. Here's Who Will Feel It Most
summary: Products like the Skyrover X1 (which looks like the DJI Mini 4 Pro drone) and Xtra Muse (a clone of the ultra-popular Osmo Pocket 3 vlogging cam) appeared for sale on Amazon in the summer of 2025, months before DJI was added…
